expectations.text: Uses jira.mjs link-types to discover available link type names
expectations.evidence: Step 1: 'jira.mjs link-types' -- 'Before creating any links, list the available link types to confirm the exact type names supported by this Jira instance. The SKILL.md explicitly instructs: "List available link types first."'

expectations.text: Creates a 'blocks' link between PROJ-100 and PROJ-200
expectations.evidence: Step 2: 'jira.mjs link DO-100 DO-200 --type "Blocks"' -- 'This creates a link where DO-100 blocks DO-200.'

expectations.text: Creates a 'relates to' link between PROJ-100 and PROJ-50
expectations.evidence: Step 3: 'jira.mjs link DO-100 DO-50 --type "relates to"' -- 'This creates a symmetric "relates to" link between DO-100 and DO-50.'

expectations.text: Uses jira.mjs link command for both operations
expectations.evidence: Both link operations use 'jira.mjs link': Step 2 'jira.mjs link DO-100 DO-200 --type "Blocks"' and Step 3 'jira.mjs link DO-100 DO-50 --type "relates to"'
